modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about which employee ID to use for enrollment.

full_description_text: So, the person was trying to register for the benefit open enrollment thing, right? They called in and were like, "What employee ID do I use?" It seems like they were a bit lost on that part. I mean, they just wanted to know which number to put in, but it got a little complicated, I guess.
short_description: Confusion about which employee ID to use for enrollment.
description: So, the person was trying to register for the benefit open enrollment thing, right? They called in and were like, "What employee ID do I use?" It seems like they were a bit lost on that part. I mean, they just wanted to know which number to put in, but it got a little complicated, I guess.
